name: custom_fonts
description: Replace system fonts with Styrene B (body), Circular Std (rounded), and Apercu Mono Pro (monospaced)

replacements.find:
/// Uses the SF system fonts with carefully chosen sizes, weights, and
/// line heights that support Dynamic Type.
replacements.replace:
/// Uses custom brand fonts (Styrene B, Circular Std, Apercu Mono Pro)
/// with carefully chosen sizes, weights, and line heights that support Dynamic Type.

replacements.find:
content.font(.system(
            size: round(baseSize * scale * 10) / 10,
            weight: weight,
            design: design
        ))
replacements.replace:
content.font(AppTypography.customFont(
            size: round(baseSize * scale * 10) / 10,
            weight: weight,
            design: design
        ))
return UIFont(name: "CircularStd-Book", size: size) ?? UIFont.systemFont(ofSize: size)
return UIFont(name: "CircularStd-Book", size: size) ?? UIFont.systemFont(ofSize: size)
font-family: 'Apercu Mono Pro', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace;
